_metadata.description: Default valve hydraulic and acoustic coefficients by trim type. Values are typical/representative; always use manufacturer data for final design.

fields.xT: Pressure differential ratio factor for gas at choked flow [-]
fields.Fd: Valve style modifier for aerodynamic noise [-] (IEC 60534-8-3)
fields.trim_type: Key used to select acoustic efficiency constants

valve_presets.name: Globe Valve — Single-Port
valve_presets.service_notes: General purpose liquid and gas; best pressure drop capability; avoid severe cavitation without anti-cavitation trim

valve_presets.name: Globe Valve — Cage-Guided, Balanced
valve_presets.service_notes: Lower actuator thrust required; good rangeability; multi-hole cage reduces aerodynamic noise

valve_presets.name: Globe Valve — Double-Port
valve_presets.service_notes: Higher capacity; lower seating force; not suitable for tight shutoff

valve_presets.name: Ball Valve — Full-Bore (Rotary)
valve_presets.service_notes: Minimum pressure drop; excellent for on-off; poor control characteristics; not for throttling

valve_presets.name: Ball Valve — V-Port (Rotary)
valve_presets.service_notes: High rangeability; good for liquids with solids; V-port gives characterised flow

valve_presets.name: Butterfly Valve — Conventional (Concentric)
valve_presets.service_notes: Low cost; high Cv; limited controllability; avoid < 15° and > 70° opening

valve_presets.name: Butterfly Valve — High Performance (Double-Offset)
valve_presets.service_notes: Better seating and control than conventional; reduced hysteresis; suitable for modulating service

valve_presets.name: Rotary Valve — Eccentric Plug
valve_presets.service_notes: Good for slurries and fibrous media; cam-guided plug reduces wear

valve_presets.name: Needle Valve — Low-Flow Precision
valve_presets.service_notes: Precise low-flow control; high FL; use for analytical and metering applications

valve_presets.name: Globe Valve — Anti-Cavitation Multi-Stage Trim
valve_presets.service_notes: Multi-stage pressure reduction; eliminates cavitation by staged ΔP; required when σ < 1/FL²
